title: Custom Machinery Mekanism
body:
Custom Machinery Mekanism is an addon of the [Custom Machinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-machinery) mod that add integration for [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism).

This addon can be used to create a custom machine that can hold, consume or produce various Mekanism elements, like gas or infusions.

Obviously, this addon requires Custom Machinery and Mekanism to be installed.


### Currently supported Mekanism features : 
- Gas
- Infusion types
- Pigments
- Slurry
- Heat/Temperature
- Radiation
 

### Planned : 
- Laser
- item to infusion slots
 

This addon also brings full compatibility with KubeJS and Crafttweaker for creating machine recipes.
